import React,{useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Link,useNavigate,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{chatAPI}from'../services/api';import{AuthContext}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const{user,logout}=useContext(AuthContext);const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();const[unreadTotal,setUnreadTotal]=useState(0);useEffect(()=>{if(!user)return;const fetchUnread=async()=>{try{const res=await chatAPI.getUnreadCounts();setUnreadTotal(res.data.total||0);}catch(e){console.error('Failed to fetch unread counts',e);}};fetchUnread();const interval=setInterval(fetchUnread,15000);// Poll every 15s
return()=>clearInterval(interval);},[user]);const handleLogout=()=>{logout();navigate('/login');};const isActive=path=>location.pathname===path?'active':'';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"floating-nav-wrapper",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"floating-nav",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/dashboard",className:"nav-brand",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-brand-icon",children:"SP"}),"StaffDesk"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-links",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/dashboard",className:"nav-link ".concat(isActive('/dashboard')),children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/slots",className:"nav-link ".concat(isActive('/slots')),children:"Schedule"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/chat",className:"nav-link ".concat(isActive('/chat')),style:{position:'relative'},children:["Messages",unreadTotal>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-unread",children:unreadTotal})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/materials",className:"nav-link ".concat(isActive('/materials')),children:"Uploads"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-user",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{fontWeight:600,color:'var(--text-main)'},children:(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.name)||'Staff'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleLogout,className:"logout-btn",children:"Logout"})]})]})});};export default Navbar;
